Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-22-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeffrey Strathmeyer for Keith Bilter.

Mr. Strathmeyer presented a copy of the tax certificate which he received by fax late Friday, addressed the issue of distribtion, stated that taxes and penalties were paid in the Conservatorship matter and that they have asked for a surcharge against the Public Guardian (Conservator). The Petition for Preliminary Distribution was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-20-2012 Continued To Oct-22-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Whitney Stevens for Administrator.

The Court questioned why Counsel did not proceed with a Petition to Determine Heirship. Ms. Stevens expalined the Family relationship, which Family members were deceased, and stated that she could hire a Genealogical Researcher and have a report within 60-days. The Petition for Preliminary Distribution was continued to Ocotober 22, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to provide the Court with a Genealogical Report.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia.
